AttributeFindingRead.description: Attribution detail — AttributeRead enriched with candidates + per-item evidence.
AttributeFindingRead.title: AttributeFindingRead

AttributeRead.description: A dashboard attribute card. `null` reliability ⇔ abstain.
AttributeRead.title: AttributeRead

ConnectedAccountRead.description: Linked account — status + handle only, never tokens.
ConnectedAccountRead.title: ConnectedAccountRead

DefendOptionRead.description: One frontier option; `after` is proven by the held-out adversary (point + interval).
DefendOptionRead.title: DefendOptionRead

DiffSeg.description: A diff segment; `insf` = an inserted falsehood (decoy).
DiffSeg.title: DiffSeg

EvidenceRead.description: One piece of evidence — `proven` (causal ablation) or `likely` (correlational).
EvidenceRead.title: EvidenceRead

InferenceConfirm.description: POST /v1/inferences/{id}/confirm — the user confirms/denies (a live ground-truth signal).
InferenceConfirm.title: InferenceConfirm

Problem.description: RFC 9457 problem+json error body (the one error shape across the API).
Problem.title: Problem

Reliability.description: Calibrated reliability — point estimate + interval, 0..1 (the UI renders %).
Reliability.title: Reliability

RemediationRead.description: A proven, advise-only remediation; `within_noise`/`cant_break` are honest non-success.
RemediationRead.title: RemediationRead

RunAccepted.description: 202 response — the client polls GET /v1/runs/{id} until terminal.
RunAccepted.title: RunAccepted

RunCreate.description:
POST /v1/runs body. `params` is type-specific.

Retries are deduped via the `Idempotency-Key` request header (api-design rule), not a field.
RunCreate.title: RunCreate

Severity.description: Per-persona severity matrix; the UI computes `balanced = max(atrisk, jobseeker)`.
Severity.title: Severity

get.description: Liveness probe — used by the container HEALTHCHECK and the load balancer.
Readiness probe — verifies the database is reachable.
Profile + consents + linked accounts + retention setting.

schema.title: Response List Connectors V1 Connectors Get

post.description: Begin read-only OAuth → returns the authorize URL.

get.description: Finish OAuth → store the encrypted token (read-only scopes).
The reliability curve (calibrated reliability + the noise model).
Top-1/top-3 per attribute + modality + engine_version — the accuracy-trust view.

schema.title: Response Eval Results V1 Eval Results Get
Response List Imports V1 Imports Get

post.description: Upload an export/photo set → an ingestion run (202 + run_id).

schema.title: Response List Inferences V1 Inferences Get

get.description: Ranked candidates with calibrated reliability + the evidence join.

post.description: Trigger a remediation run; decoy requires per-use consent. Lands at M3.

schema.title: Response List Remediations V1 Remediations Get

get.description: The proven before/after (intervals, value-recovery, significant) + frontier options.
Cursor-paginated list — lands with M5.2 (routers + pagination).

schema.title: Response List Runs V1 Runs Get

post.description:
Create a run, execute it synchronously (M1.9 → queue), and return 202 + run_id.

A repeated `Idempotency-Key` returns the original run without re-running it (api-design rule).
Only `attack` is live for the tracer; `eval`/`remediation` arrive with M2/M3.

get.description: Poll a run; 404 if absent or owned by another user (RLS-hidden).

SSE stream of run status; 404 if absent or RLS-hidden.

Auth is the standard bearer — the FE proxies the stream and injects it server-side (decision
(c)), since browser EventSource can't set headers.

post.description: Request cancellation — lands with the arq worker (M1.9).
Svix-verified; syncs user.created/updated/deleted into the users mirror. Idempotent.
